title: MUSIC VIDEO RENDER A — Three Little Pigs (Papa LOCKED at FRONT, visible huff-puff, v2)
reuseAssetNote: ONE 15s render of Papa-as-cartoon-wolf LOCKED at the FRONT of the tower-house (Sara peeking from LEFT window, Eva peeking from RIGHT window). Looped 6× with crossfade to fill the 90s music block (75% of original 120s, per user feedback). Loop choreography: in-place wolf wiggle → cheek-puff → gentle blow → defeated slump → repeat.

usedUnderSongs.song: assets/music/Little Pigs Let Me Come In.mp3

preRenderNote: v2 redesign — fixes the v1 multi-position-path bug where Papa was described pacing LEFT then BACK then RIGHT then FRONT (4 named positions made Kling spawn multiple Papas). Now Papa stays LOCKED at the FRONT of the tower throughout the 15s render. The visible huff-puff (cheek-puff + gentle blow) is the action centerpiece. Composition anchored by the Nano Banana 3-character group still (group_ep13_clipA_three_little_pigs.png).
prompt: Composition is anchored by @ep13-clipA-group. Animate the still gently — only Papa's arm gestures and facial expression change. Papa stays planted in front of the tower throughout the entire 15s — never moves position. Sara stays peeking from the LEFT window of the tower throughout. Eva stays peeking from the RIGHT window of the tower throughout. Exactly THREE people in the entire frame, no extras, no additional Sara, no additional Eva. (BEAT 1, 0-5s) Papa wiggles his fingers softly like playful wolf paws near his cheeks, big silly warm dad-grin. Sara giggles from her window. Eva giggles from her window. (BEAT 2, 5-10s) Papa puffs his cheeks dramatically — VISIBLE HUFF-PUFF! — eyes crinkled, theatrical wind-up. Both kids giggle louder from their windows. (BEAT 3, 10-15s) Papa gently blows the air out softly with a small wind-blow gesture, then theatrically slumps his shoulders in cheerful defeat. Both kids shake their heads NO triumphantly from their windows. Designed to LOOP cleanly back to the still's starting pose at second 15. Soft cartoon hot-dog-shape pastel confetti drifts down. NO scary wolf face, NO growl, pure cheerful kid-show comedy. Papa stays planted, never walks, never circles the tower.
